description:
"Wynn", "Eria", "Hiita", and "Aussa" struggle with a trial that requires them to move a massive boulder.
Amid their efforts, Wynn comes across a lost baby "Gora Turtle".
As she cares for the little one during a brief respite, a gentle, almost parental affection begins to grow within her.
Determined to help reunite the creature with its family, the four set out once again to the boulder-moving trial with renewed resolve, but...
Source: Official English Website

titles.title: Seireijutsu no Tsukaite III "Fuurei Tsukai Wynn"
Spirit Charmers III: "Wynn the Wind Charmer"
精霊術の使い手III「風霊使いウィン」
